parameters.description: Must have "dot" installed in the system path ( graphviz )

parameters.group_lead: <true/false> - optional, says if the touch will lead a mix group of controls; defaults to true for clients

value.asio_post_dispose_buffers_sleep_ms-desc: ms to sleep after calling asio disposeBuffers
value.vst3_plugin_forward_key_event_depth-desc: Specify the max allowed hwnd ancestor depth to allow when attaching custom wndProcs to vst3 hwnds that forwards key events up the chain
value.loop_back_stereo_out-desc: Used for loop back stereo output functional tests
value.loop_back_stereo_in-desc: Used for loop back stereo input functional tests
value.loop_back_mono_out-desc: Used for loop back mono output functional tests
value.loop_back_mono_in-desc: Used for loop back mono input functional tests
value.author_factory_presets-desc: Saves user preset json files in the factory preset format.
value.cloud_server-desc: Sets the web server name to target
value.uad2_plugins_dpi_awareness_disabler-desc: Use the ScopedDPIAwarenessDisabler for UAD2 plugins
value.instrument_detection_misc-desc: Support Misc instrument type as detected by the instrument analysis
value.asio_pre_dispose_buffers_sleep_ms-desc: ms to sleep before calling asio disposeBuffers
value.quit_with_main_window-desc: Makes LUNA quit when the main window is closed
value.functional_tests-desc: Adds the 'Functional Tests' menu item to the bottom of the 'File' menu
value.trackheaders_autoscroll_trigger_distance: Specifies how close to an edge the position needs to be before the viewport should scroll in that direction
value.helper_service_log_level-desc: The logging verbosity of the Helper Service. 0 Silent (default), 1 Failure, 2 Warning, 3 Message, 4 Debug
value.new_control_room_treatment-desc: Update the treatment for the Control Room (specifically the upper portion)
value.track_follows_via_toggle-desc: Enables toggle of time/tempo when clicking the track header MODE.  (Normally this is done via popup menu).
value.node_page_auto_start-desc: Start on Node page if no Console page is active
value.max_sentry_errors_per_day-desc: Max number of sentry errors to send each day, per user.
value.record_user_events-desc: Enables the recording of user events.
value.trackheaders_autoscroll_max_speed-desc: The maximum number of pixels that the viewport is allowed to scroll by
value.quit_with_mixer_engine-desc: When mixer engine quits or crashes quit the app
value.volt_in_luna-desc: Uses the VOLT settings and monitor section in LUNA
value.settings_in_popover-desc: Put settings in a popover instead of in a page
value.dynamic_auto_gain-desc: This tells the algo to restart listening after adjust gain
value.test_assert-desc: Force an assert on session open
value.show_deck_ref_asserts-desc: Show deck data asserts for LUNA
value.luna_hooks_folder-desc: Path to a folder with json files for executables
value.track_selection_draw_all_track_edges-des: When drawing track header selection lines draw not only the top/bottom of selected regions but also edges of tracks in the middle
value.dante_sample_rate_delay_workaround-desc: Mixer Helper waits before notifying client of sample rate changes.
value.input_row_header_device_channel_name-des: Show the device channel name (instead of just INPUT) in the input header row even if the user has changed it.
value.add_hb_system_paths-desc: This makes it so we can turn it off for Mixer Helper
value.enable_device_streaming-desc: Makes it so Mixer Helper can use the audio streaming for auto gain
value.enable_dante_over_wifi-desc: Whether to enable Dante devices to work over WiFi
value.recent_plugin_versions-desc: How many recent plugin versions to offer for install
value.font_size_adjust-desc: Adjusts the dynamic fonts by this amount
value.enable_identify_analytic-desc: Whether to enable sending Identify message to segment
value.use_uad_console_factory_device_presets-d: Uses UAD Console location for device factory presets
value.user_agent_app_name-desc: Override app name to use in the Ntwk_HTTPUtils user agent string
value.console_auto_page_select-desc: Enables auto page select for devices
value.recent_app_versions-desc: How many recent app versions to offer for install
value.assistant-desc: Enables the assistant GUI and service
value.volt_snap_window_size-desc: Makes the Volt page snap to a default size at first run of Console in either USB or ADAT mode
value.stay_open_for_sub_windows-desc: Makes it so C3 can stay open if the output meters are open
value.always_show_close_button-desc: Makes it so C3 has the close button for settings
value.config_plugin_scenes-desc: Allows plugin scenes to be enabled per configuration
value.show_assistant_replies-desc: Show the replies in the assistant panel
value.supports_assistant-desc: This should only be supported in LUNA
value.enable_midi_learn-desc: Whether enable MIDI mapping and learn features
value.enable_node_hw-desc: Enables the Dante node hw POC
value.allow_apollo_engine-desc: Allows the Apollo engine to be used
value.user_agent_app_version-desc: Override app version to use in the Ntwk_HTTPUtils user agent string
value.conditional_app_min_width-desc: Makes it so C3 constrains the window based on which GUI components are shown
value.auto_install_plugins-desc: Auto install certain plugins on launch
value.next_gen_music_creation-desc: Show Next Gen Music Creation page on startup
value.dante_client_enabled-desc: Dante client mgr should be running and available
value.drag_insert_to_remove-desc: Allows dragging of assigned inserts outside of slot to remove the insert
value.workspace_folder-desc: Used for the workspace folder name
value.new_footer-desc: Show the new footer in the main window
value.allow_mon_cue-desc: Allow monitoring cue when cue is monitoring mix
value.use_shopify-desc: Use the new shopify subdomains in URLs
value.loop_back_input_src-desc: Used to declare if the loop back inputs are 'Mic' or 'Line'
value.tutorials-desc: Enables the Tutorials in the Help Menu
value.fader_mouse_wheel_requires_alt-desc: If true, user needs to hold alt to perform mouse wheel control changes (faders, knobs, etc) and unmod'ed wheel events will count as scrolls.  If false, wheel events go to controls regardless.
value.chat_help-desc: Enables togglable web view for AI chat help
value.bottom_justify_cells-desc: Bottom justify cells in channels within the viewport
value.enable_buffer_selection-desc: Enables buffer selection for Core Audio and Apollo users

parameters.error_title: <title for an error message dialog - optional>
parameters.error_action_data: [a JSON object for Action button - optional, constist of FIELD_ERROR_BTN_TITLE, FIELD_ERROR_PATH and optional FIELD_ERROR_PARAMS]

parameters.seconds: <float - max seconds to analyze: default 30, <=0 means infinite>

parameters.search_text: search text, that could be full word or combination of few words or just beginning of the word as well

parameters.path: <path> path to new plugin on disk
